rows.label: qev085102_MSG0001
rows.name: Elma-san, this is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0002
rows.name: Traces of a campfire mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0003
rows.name:
Judging by the residual heat, it seems they
haven't been gone from here for very long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0004
rows.name:
A campfire— I wonder if those
aliens would do such a thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_JNK0010
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: qev085102_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out that the possibility exists.

rows.label: qev085102_JNK0020
rows.name: Alert

rows.label: qev085102_SEL0021
rows.name: Notice a suspicious noise and report it.

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0005
rows.name: True— Let's search around here a bit more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0006
rows.name: Elma-san, Tatsu heard a sound mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0007
rows.name: A sound—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0008
rows.name: Someone is coming. Everyone, hide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0009
rows.name: A step too late, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0010
rows.name: Where did that duo run off to?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0011
rows.name: One of them is the size of a Doll, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0012
rows.name:
There shouldn't be that many
places for them to hide, but—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0013
rows.name: Let's report to the captain for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0014
rows.name: Those guys— They're Growth mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Elma-san. Just now, they said
one is the size of a Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0016
rows.name: And they mentioned a duo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0017
rows.name:
If it's those aliens, why— I mean, they're
members of the Growth, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0018
rows.name:
They got beaten by Tatsu and couldn't
stay with the Growth anymore mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0019
rows.name: By. Who?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0020
rows.name: But that possibility does exist, doesn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0021
rows.name: It's highly likely it's that duo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0022
rows.name:
How about we try asking those
Growth soldiers directly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0023
rows.name: What do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev085102_SEL0031
rows.name: Support Lin's opinion.

rows.label: qev085102_JNK0040
rows.name: Oppose

rows.label: qev085102_SEL0041
rows.name: Suggest continuing the search.

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yes. That squad— There are only a few of
them. Let's try extracting some information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085102_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yes. It's best not to needlessly
escalate things. Let's go.[ST:wait ]
